params.name: heading
params.description: Heading to use within the Card / Callout. Ignored if `headingHtml` is provided.

params.name: headingHtml
params.description: HTML to use inside the heading.

params.name: html
params.description: HTML to use inside the callout body.

params.name: text
params.description: Plain text to use inside the callout body.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the Card / Callout.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes to add to the Card / Callout.
